APPEARANCES: Rod Divelbiss, Esq., 510-625-7700 of Divelbiss & Bonzell, LLP for Plaintiff and Opposing Party; Peter J. Keith, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3908 for Defendant and Moving Party.

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Owen J. Clements Deputy City Attorney for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco
Rod Divelbiss for plaintiff and opposing party: Geneva Towers Limited
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses and produce documents for inspection and copying by July 5, 2005. The Court finds that plaintiff asserted unmeritorious objections and opposed the instant motion without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1500 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
